If you need to make changes to your booking (dates, room type, or number of guests), here is how the process works.

**How changes work**

 - Booking changes are not made by modifying your existing booking in place
 - A change request creates a new booking; the original booking is cancelled and a new one is issued
 - Subject to availability at the time of the request

**What you need to do**

 - Email us at [EMAIL] with your booking reference and the details of what you would like to change
 - Include your preferred new dates or room type so we can check availability straight away
 - Changes must be requested within the notice period allowed by your rate type

**Bookings are non-transferable** — they cannot be passed to another person.

Full cancellation and changes details:
<https://hostel-positano.com/en/guides/changing-cancelling>

Best regards,
Hostel Brikette

template_subject: Key Italian Phrases for Your Stay

refined_body_redacted:
A few useful Italian phrases to help with transport, dining, and everyday situations. **Transport** - "Un biglietto per Positano, per favore" — one ticket to Positano, please - "Dove si convalida?" — Where do I validate my ticket? - "Scendo alla prossima" — I am getting off at the next stop - "A che ora parte l'ultima corsa?" — What time is the last departure? **Cafés and dining** - "Prendo un espresso al banco" — I'll have an espresso at the bar - "Possiamo avere il conto, per favore?" — Can we have the bill, please? - "Cosa consiglia oggi?" — What do you recommend today? - "Acqua del rubinetto" — tap water (usually free when you ask) - "È possibile senza glutine?" — Is it possible without gluten?

Best regards,
Hostel Brikette

Thank you for your email. We get questions about complimentary breakfast from time to time, and we're happy to explain the logic clearly. ### 1) What breakfast is Complimentary breakfast is a **direct-booking benefit** that we include only for reservations made through **our own website**. ### 2) Why it's not included on third-party reservations When a reservation is made through a third-party booking platform, that platform charges a **commission** for providing discovery, marketing, booking and payment infrastructure. This means we receive less for the same room and dates than we do when you book directly with us.

We understand your concern and we are reviewing this with priority.

Best regards,
Hostel Brikette

Best regards,
Hostel Brikette

A few useful Italian phrases to help with transport, dining, and everyday situations. **Transport** - "Un biglietto per Positano, per favore" — one ticket to Positano, please - "Dove si convalida?" — Where do I validate my ticket? - "Scendo alla prossima" — I am getting off at the next stop - "A che ora parte l'ultima corsa?" — What time is the last departure? **Cafés and dining** - "Prendo un espresso al banco" — I'll have an espresso at the bar - "Possiamo avere il conto, per favore?" — Can we have the bill, please? - "Cosa consiglia oggi?" — What do you recommend today? - "Acqua del rubinetto" — tap water (usually free when you ask) - "È possibile senza glutine?" — Is it possible without gluten?

For this specific question we want to give you the most accurate answer — Pete or Cristiana will follow up with you directly.

Best regards,
Hostel Brikette

refined_body_redacted:

**Estimated cost**

 - Airport to/from Positano: approx. €130 per vehicle

Prices are per vehicle (not per person) and are confirmed directly with the driver.

**How to book**

 - Contact reception and we will connect you with our recommended driver via WhatsApp
 - Have your travel date, time, pickup point, and number of passengers ready
 - Confirm the fare directly with the driver before proceeding

For current rates on other routes (Naples Centrale, Salerno, Sorrento), please ask reception.

Best regards,
Hostel Brikette

If you need to make changes to your booking (dates, room type, or number of guests), here is how the process works.

**How changes work**

 - Booking changes are not made by modifying your existing booking in place
 - A change request creates a new booking; the original booking is cancelled and a new one is issued
 - Subject to availability at the time of the request

**What you need to do**

 - Email us at [EMAIL] with your booking reference and the details of what you would like to change
 - Include your preferred new dates or room type so we can check availability straight away
 - Changes must be requested within the notice period allowed by your rate type

**Bookings are non-transferable** — they cannot be passed to another person.

Full cancellation and changes details:
<https://hostel-positano.com/en/guides/changing-cancelling>

Hostel Brikette

A few useful Italian phrases to help with transport, dining, and everyday situations. **Transport** - "Un biglietto per Positano, per favore" — one ticket to Positano, please - "Dove si convalida?" — Where do I validate my ticket? - "Scendo alla prossima" — I am getting off at the next stop - "A che ora parte l'ultima corsa?" — What time is the last departure? **Cafés and dining** - "Prendo un espresso al banco" — I'll have an espresso at the bar - "Possiamo avere il conto, per favore?" — Can we have the bill, please? - "Cosa consiglia oggi?" — What do you recommend today? - "Acqua del rubinetto" — tap water (usually free when you ask) - "È possibile senza glutine?" — Is it possible without gluten?

For this specific question we want to give you the most accurate answer — Pete or Cristiana will follow up with you directly.

Best regards,
Hostel Brikette

template_subject: Private Transfer to Positano — Booking Through Reception

refined_body_redacted:
A private transfer is the most comfortable way to travel between the airports, Naples, and Positano. We work with a recommended driver who covers these routes.

**Estimated cost**

 - Airport to/from Positano: approx. €130 per vehicle

Prices are per vehicle (not per person) and are confirmed directly with the driver.

**How to book**

 - Contact reception and we will connect you with our recommended driver via WhatsApp
 - Have your travel date, time, pickup point, and number of passengers ready
 - Confirm the fare directly with the driver before proceeding

For current rates on other routes (Naples Centrale, Salerno, Sorrento), please ask reception.

Best regards,
Hostel Brikette

If you need to make changes to your booking (dates, room type, or number of guests), here is how the process works.

**How changes work**

 - Booking changes are not made by modifying your existing booking in place
 - A change request creates a new booking; the original booking is cancelled and a new one is issued
 - Subject to availability at the time of the request

**What you need to do**

 - Email us at [EMAIL] with your booking reference and the details of what you would like to change
 - Include your preferred new dates or room type so we can check availability straight away
 - Changes must be requested within the notice period allowed by your rate type

**Bookings are non-transferable** — they cannot be passed to another person.

Full cancellation and changes details:
<https://hostel-positano.com/en/guides/changing-cancelling>

Best regards,
Hostel Brikette

Our female-only dorm is reserved exclusively for women and has its own ensuite bathroom.

**Booking rules**

 - Only women may book beds in the female-only dorm
 - Mixed-gender groups cannot book into this room — companions of a different gender will need to be assigned to a separate dorm or a private room
 - There are no exceptions to this policy

**Visitors**

 - Visitors are not permitted in any guest rooms, including the female-only dorm
 - Guests and their visitors may use the communal areas only

We get questions about complimentary breakfast from time to time, and we're happy to explain the logic clearly. ### 1) What breakfast is Complimentary breakfast is a **direct-booking benefit** that we include only for reservations made through **our own website**. ### 2) Why it's not included on third-party reservations When a reservation is made through a third-party booking platform, that platform charges a **commission** for providing discovery, marketing, booking and payment infrastructure. This means we receive less for the same room and dates than we do when you book directly with us.

We understand your concern and we are reviewing this with priority.

Best regards,
Hostel Brikette
